name: seo-organic-growth
description: Optimize Mystická Hvězda for maximum organic traffic, SEO rankings, and new user engagement through analytics, schema markup, internal linking, and conversion optimization

actions.name: setup-google-analytics
actions.description: Initialize Google Analytics 4 with proper tracking and event configuration

actions.name: add-schema-markup
actions.description: Generate and add JSON-LD schema markup (Organization, BreadcrumbList, Article, FAQPage, LocalService)

actions.name: build-internal-links
actions.description: Build contextual internal linking strategy between blog posts, features, and related content

actions.name: create-rss-feed
actions.description: Generate RSS feed for blog posts to boost discoverability and syndication

actions.name: optimize-landing-pages
actions.description: Create dedicated, high-converting landing pages for key search terms

actions.name: add-testimonial-schema
actions.description: Add customer reviews and testimonial schema markup with star ratings

actions.name: setup-email-automation
actions.description: Configure email automation sequences for newsletter subscribers and trial users

actions.name: analyze-conversion-funnel
actions.description: Generate conversion funnel analysis (visits → trial → paid conversion)

actions.name: optimize-seo-keywords
actions.description: Analyze and optimize for target keywords with proper density and positioning

actions.name: setup-ab-testing
actions.description: Initialize A/B testing framework for CTAs, headlines, and conversion optimization

context.estimatedTime: Varies - 1 hour to 2 weeks depending on action
